# l'écoute — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A compassionate support and listening service designed for people who need someone to talk to. The service focuses on providing a safe, empathetic space where individuals can feel heard and supported during difficult times. The brand centers around warmth, care, and human connection.

---

## Pages

### Accueil
https://example.com
Un espace bienveillant pour parler de votre mal-être. Nos écoutants vous soutiennent avec empathie face à la dépression. Contactez-nous pour un soutien immédiat.

### Merci | l'écoute
https://example.com/thank-you
l'écoute - Merci | l'écoute

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About l'écoute
A compassionate support and listening service designed for people who need someone to talk to. The service focuses on providing a safe, empathetic space where individuals can feel heard and supported during difficult times. The brand centers around warmth, care, and human connection.

## Target Audience
- people who need support and someone to listen to them
- Emotionally Vulnerable Adults
- College Students Under Stress
- Caregivers Seeking Relief

## Industry
Mental Health & Emotional Support

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
